mechanism: Potent FLT3 inhibitor (also inhibits BCR‑ABL and other kinases); robust activity in FLT3‑ITD AML models
additional_notes: Indicated for CML/Ph+ ALL; reported low‑nM potency; active in MOLM‑13 and MV4‑11

mechanism: FLT3 inhibitor with activity across FLT3‑ITD AML lines
additional_notes: Approved for RCC/GIST; reported nM potency in MOLM‑13 and related models

mechanism: Inhibits FLT3 WT and mutants (including D835) and other kinases (e.g., MET, VEGFR2)
additional_notes: Approved for RCC/HCC/MTC; reported low‑nM activity; active in MOLM‑13

mechanism: Inhibits FLT3 signaling in AML models in addition to VEGFR
additional_notes: Approved for RCC; reported low‑nM activity; activity in MOLM‑13/MV4‑11

mechanism: Potent against FLT3‑ITD; antiproliferative in AML cell lines
additional_notes: Approved for CRC/GIST/HCC; reported nM potency; activity includes MOLM‑13
Also known as ZD6474; reported nM–sub‑µM activity in FLT3‑ITD AML models

mechanism: Off‑target FLT3 inhibition in addition to VEGFR/PDGFR; reported activity in FLT3‑ITD AML cell lines
additional_notes: Approved for RCC/STS; reported sub‑µM activity

mechanism: Inhibits MEK1/2 in the RAS/RAF/MEK/ERK pathway; active in RAS/MAPK‑driven AML models
additional_notes: Approved for melanoma; reported sub‑µM activity; MOLM‑13 responsiveness reported in screens

mechanism: Inhibits mTOR signaling to suppress AML cell proliferation
additional_notes: Approved for RCC and other cancers; text also references Temsirolimus as similar mTOR inhibitor; reported sub‑µM–µM activity; activity includes MOLM‑13

mechanism: Inhibits STAT5 pathway signaling leading to apoptosis in FLT3‑ITD AML cells
additional_notes: Reported µM activity; active in MOLM‑13; dopamine D2 receptor antagonist by original indication

mechanism: Targets leukemia stem/progenitor cells; proposed to disrupt dopamine receptor signaling and induce apoptosis
additional_notes: Reported µM activity in AML cell lines

mechanism: Reversibly inhibits 26S proteasome, inducing proteotoxic stress and apoptosis
additional_notes: Approved for MM/MCL; reported nM cytotoxicity in AML lines including MOLM‑13

mechanism: Irreversible 20S proteasome inhibitor causing accumulation of ubiquitinated proteins and apoptosis
additional_notes: Approved for MM; reported nM potency in AML lines including MOLM‑13

mechanism: Inhibits mitochondrial translation, impairing oxidative phosphorylation in AML cells/LSCs
additional_notes: Reported µM activity; selectively impairs AML blasts/LSCs; MOLM‑13 sensitivity reported

mechanism: Inhibits thioredoxin reductase leading to ROS accumulation and AML cytotoxicity
additional_notes: Approved for rheumatoid arthritis; reported sub‑µM–µM activity; active in MOLM‑13

mechanism: Inhibits ALDH; reported to target NPL4 and induce proteotoxic/ROS stress (often potentiated by copper)
additional_notes: Used for alcohol‑use disorder; activity in AML lines including MOLM‑13; often tested ± copper cofactor

mechanism: Broad inhibition of HDAC isoforms leading to chromatin remodeling and apoptosis
additional_notes: Approved for MM; strong preclinical AML activity with MOLM‑13 sensitivity; reported sub‑µM activity
